expectations.text: Exactly one new commit is created for the task
expectations.evidence: Commit info: defda4822095ba3f7b0f67ccdee5134b4207f639 feat: add audit logging for admin actio

expectations.text: Execution proceeds without requiring an issue number
Commit message contains a Co-authored-by trailer matching Co-authored-by: NAME <EMAIL>
Origin push succeeds for the working branch
A PR URL is produced or gh pr create was attempted
Summary output includes branch and commit SHA
expectations.evidence: Branch: feat/add-audit-logs, SHA in output: True
